---
title: "Home"
---

::: hero-section
# Open Methods Hub

**Design, execute, and communicate original research in mass media.**

Your central hub for MC 451 and MC 501 --- textbook chapters, R workbook, tools, and resources in one place. Follow the sidebar to read in order.
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## How to Use This Site

The sidebar on the left follows the textbook (*From Vibes to Variables*, 2nd Edition) chapter by chapter across five parts. Each entry links to either a Hub page with hands-on R walkthroughs or the corresponding textbook chapter.

**Start here if you are new:**

::::: card-grid
::: card
### Set Up Your Workspace

Install R, RStudio, Obsidian, and GitHub. Download the Methods Vault.

[Get Started](setup.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: card
### Read the Textbook

22 chapters from foundations to publication --- free and open access.

[Open Textbook](https://sim-lab-siue.github.io/vibes-to-variables/){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: card
### R Workbook

Seven chapters with narrated video walkthroughs --- from codebook to published portfolio.

[Open Workbook](workbook/index.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::

::: card
### Methods Vault

Download your Obsidian workspace --- journals, project folders, and offline textbook chapters.

[Get the Vault](methods-vault.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## The Five Parts

Over one semester, you build a complete content analysis from scratch --- qualitative immersion through quantitative testing --- using real media data.

| Part | Chapters | Focus |
|------|----------|-------|
| **I: Foundations** | 1--4 | Curiosity, trust, reading journals, organizing research |
| **II: Design** | 5--9 | Theory, literature, research questions, ethics, methods overview |
| **III: Methods** | 10--12 | Content analysis, surveys, experiments |
| **IV: Execution** | 13--20 | Codebook, data collection, R programming, visualization, inference, interpretation |
| **V: Communication** | 21--22 | Portfolio assembly, GitHub Pages, going live |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## The Ecosystem

Four tools work together throughout the course. Each serves a distinct role.

| Tool | What It Does | When You Use It |
|------|-------------|-----------------|
| [**Methods Vault**](methods-vault.qmd) | Obsidian workspace for journals, notes, and project files | Every week --- your personal research archive |
| [**R Workbook**](workbook/index.qmd) | Hands-on R tutorials with narrated videos | Parts III--V --- learning R for data analysis |
| [**coursepackR**](resources/index.qmd) | R package that delivers weekly assignment templates and data | Every week --- `download_week("mc451", N)` in R |
| [**Textbook**](https://sim-lab-siue.github.io/vibes-to-variables/) | *From Vibes to Variables* (2nd Edition, 22 chapters) | Every week --- conceptual foundations for each part |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Course Information

**Instructor:** Dr. Alex P. Leith
**Office:** Dunham Hall 1017
**Office Hours:** MW 10:00--11:30 AM and 1:30--3:00 PM (or by appointment)

[View MC 451 Syllabus](syllabus.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} [View MC 501 Syllabus](mc501-syllabus.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary} [How It Works](how-it-works.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
